name: South Gate of Bree
description:
You are at the southern gate of Bree.  The Great East Road heads off east to
Weathertop, a talked about hill that is used by travellers as a rest point when
travelling in this region.  The road heads west into Bree where any adventurer
can find good food, ale, and a nice comfortable bed.  The Greenway continues
southwest.  The Great East Road continues east.  You see the town of Bree to the
west.
